content.full_text:
SEP 24 210 PM '90

Patrick Kurihara
14607 Ave. 412
Orosi, Ca. 93647

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street
Sacramento, Ca. 95814
Attn: Mark Morodomi

Sept. 21, 1990

Dear Mark,

This is a letter to follow-up my conversation with you on Sept. 18, 1990.

To re-iterate my situation. The Cutler-Orosi Unified School District has 3 seats on the Board of Trustees up for election. There is a group of parents that would like to campaign for the 3 positions as a slate.

My understanding is that the parents can do so without any filing of papers with the State whatsoever if we keep our total collections and expenditures under $1000.00.

We plan to do this independent of any of the candidates. The candidates will not be involved in any of the decisions as to when, how, why, or content of the campaign. No monies will be collected from the candidates.

We plan to have all contributions to be under $100.00, mainly in individual $10.00 to $25.00 contributions.

We plan to keep financial records of receipts and expenditures with excess funds at the end of the campaign to be donated to charity or school projects.

Please respond with a letter stating that our understanding of not needing to file, and our plan of campaign is proper. If you have any suggestions or additional information that we should be aware of please state so.
Thank you.

Sincerely,
Patrick Kurihara
